raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ka es pretti teem eſ-
mu nomohdā btjis tohs istrau-
dains/ un nolausdains/ un poh-
ftidains/ un famaitadains/ un
faunn darridams/ ta gribbu es
pahr teew nomohdā buht/ tohs
ustaisiht/ un dehſtihſ/ faſka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tannig Deenās tee wairs
ne fazzihſ: Tee Tehwi irr ne-
eenahkufchus Wihna·Kekkarus
ehduſcht/ kn teem Behrneem irr
tee Sohbt apmifejschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ikkatram buhs fawa
Noṣeguma deht nomirt/ikkatrs
Zilweks/ kaß ne-eenahkufchus
Wihna·Kekkarus ehḍ/ tam Soh-
bi apmifehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redsi/ tahs Deenas
nahks/ faſka tas KUNGS: Ka
es ar to Israēta Nammu/ un
ar to Nammu Juhda weenu
jaunu Derribu darrifchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne ka to Derribu/ ko es
ar winnu Telweem efmu dar-
rijs tai Deena/ kad es tohs pee
winan Rohkas fatwehrn/ un is-
weddu tohs no Egiptes-Sem-
mes/ kuren mannu Derribu tee
irr isnihzinajſchi/ ka man tee bij
geeti jawalda/ faſka tas KUNgs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet fcht irr ta Derriba/
ko es ar to Israēta Nammu
darrifchu pehz faham Deenahm/
faſka tas KUNGS: Es dohſchn
fawu Banslibu winno Widdu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tad ne mahzihś wairs
Draugs Draugu/ nedś Brahlis
Brahti/ un fazzihś: Atsibſtcet
to KUNGII/ jo tee wiſsnotak
manni atsihs/ tik labbi winno
Masee ka winno Leelee/ faſka tas
KUNGS. Jo es peedohſchu
winno Noseegumu/ un ne pee-
minnefchu wairs winno Greh-
kus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta faſka tas KUNGS:
Kaß to Sauli par Spihdekli
dohd Deenā/ to Mehnesi/ un to
Swaigsun Likkunus par Spih-
dekli Nakti/ kaß to Juhen ku-
ſina/ ka winnas Wilni kanz/
KUNGS Zebaot irr winna
Wahrds.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad fchee Likkuni man-
nā Preekſcha mittesers/ faſka tas
KUNGS: Tad ir mittesers I-
sraēta Dsimmums wairs wee-
na Tauta ne buht manna Preek-
ſcha muhschain.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta faſka tas KUNGS:
Ja tahs Debbesis angſchan
warr mehrotas/ un tahs Sem-
mes Dibbeni appafcha warr is-
manniti tapt/ tad ir es atmetti-
fchu winnu Israēta Dsimmumu
wiſa deht/ ko tee irr darriftchi/
faſka tas KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ tahs Deenas
nahks/ faſka tas KUNGS: Ka
ſchis Pilſſahts tam KUNGam
taps uszelts/noAnaneēta Turna
lihds tahm Stuhru-Wahrtim.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
